# RequestMeta.Additional property

Any additional `_meta` keys beyond the protocol-defined ones — for example `progressToken`, `traceparent`/`tracestate`/`baggage`, or third-party keys. Carried through unchanged so receivers can echo or act on them (§4.2).

```csharp
public JsonObject? Additional { get; set; }
```
